tables.name: tasks
tables.label: Tasks
tables.description: Nested units of work. A task may have a parent task, forming a tree.

tables.name: notes
tables.label: Notes
tables.description: Free-form notes. Each note has a title, a body, and an optional date and tags.

tables.name: profiles
tables.label: Profiles
tables.description: Contexts a task can belong to (work, personal, …). A task may have several.
